title: TripUpdate
description: A multi-dimensional update to an in-progress or upcoming mobility trip, covering contract modifications (added/removed services, route changes), status notifications (driver arriving, trip started), and real-time tracking endpoint information.

contractChanges.description: Items added or modified in the trip contract (new stop, route change, add-on service)

cancelledItems.description: Items removed from the original trip contract

stateUpdate.description: Status notification for the traveler (e.g. driver arriving, trip started, trip ended, driver changed)

trackingEndpoint.description: Real-time tracking endpoint including URL, protocol, and data schema reference

driverRef.description: Reference to the current driver if changed from the originally assigned driver

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this trip update was issued
